# CMBufferQueueGetTypeID()

**Function**

Returns the type identifier of buffer queue objects.

## Declaration

```swift
func CMBufferQueueGetTypeID() -> CFTypeID
```

## Return Value

CFTypeID of `CMBufferQueue` objects.

## Discussion

You can check if a `CFTypeRef` object is actually a `CMBufferQueue` by comparing [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFGetTypeID(_:)](object) with [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMBufferQueueGetTypeID()]().
title: CMBufferQueueGetTypeID()
